title: AE2 Dark Mode
description: Dark Mode textures for Applied Energistics 2
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae3e544b4d14b58e8918d10270f589cd5c1808f2.png)
With the AE2 release for 1.21, the textures have undergone significant changes, adopting a much lighter palette.

Aware that this might not appeal to everyone, I've created a Dark Mode version of the textures for those who prefer their machines with a darker color scheme.

**NOTE:** This Resource Pack is still WIP, and more Dark Mode textures will be added to it once available (i.e. AddOn Support).

**Currently Supported Addons:**
- [AE2WLIB](https://modrinth.com/mod/applied-energistics-2-wireless-terminals)
- [Extended AE](https://modrinth.com/mod/extended-ae)
- Applied Flux
- [AE2 Import Export Card](https://modrinth.com/mod/ae2-import-export-card)

![GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4ad5d1555f7ce1dc13ca603728959eb2410da574.png)

![Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a0ba757950767f2b7b9802c091cca37a9071ca00.png)
